What We Do

Our Services

Professional window replacement company solutions tailored to your needs.

Window Replacement

Upgrade your home with energy-efficient, durable windows.

Learn More →

Door Replacement

Upgrade your home's security and style with new doors.

Learn More →

Patio Door Installation

Seamlessly connect your indoor and outdoor living spaces with new patio doors.

Learn More →

Energy-Efficient Windows

Reduce energy bills and improve comfort with energy-efficient windows.

Learn More →

Window Repair

Extend the life of your windows with professional repair services.

Learn More →

Custom Window Design

Create unique windows tailored to your style and architectural needs.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality window replacement company services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

Windows & Doors Center did an amazing job replacing all the windows in my 1930s Craftsman bungalow in Belmont Heights. They were professional, efficient, and the new windows look fantastic! Huge improvement in noise reduction too.

Maria S.
★★★★★

We had a sliding glass door installed by Windows & Doors Center, and we're very happy with the results. The installation team was on time, courteous, and cleaned up everything afterwards. There was a small delay getting the door, but they kept us informed throughout the process.

David K.
★★★★

Our energy bills have noticeably decreased since Windows & Doors Center installed our new energy-efficient windows. The team was knowledgeable and helped us choose the right windows for our needs and budget. Highly recommend!

Jessica L.
★★★★★

Great experience from start to finish. Windows & Doors Center replaced our front door, and it looks beautiful. The installer was very detail-oriented and made sure everything was perfect. Feel much safer now too!

Robert P.
★★★★★

I had a cracked window pane, and Windows & Doors Center was able to repair it quickly and affordably. They were very responsive and professional. Saved me from having to replace the entire window!.

Karen M.
★★★★

From the initial consultation to the final inspection, Windows & Doors Center provided exceptional service. They replaced all the windows in our home with high-quality, energy-efficient windows, and the difference is remarkable. Highly recommend their services!

Michael B.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose Windows & Doors Center

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

How long does window replacement take?
The duration depends on the number of windows and the complexity of the installation, but most projects are completed within a few days. We'll provide a detailed timeline during the consultation.
What types of windows do you offer?
We offer a wide variety of window styles, including double-hung, casement, sliding, bay, and picture windows. We also offer different frame materials, such as vinyl, wood, and aluminum.
Do you offer a warranty on your windows?
Yes, all of our windows come with a manufacturer's warranty, and we also offer a workmanship warranty on our installations. We stand behind our work and are committed to your satisfaction.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Windows & Doors Center.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
